/- An operator T between RCLike spaces is said to be of RCLike type if it has
  restricted weak type and is weakly continuous. -/
structure RCLikeType (T : (α → 𝕂) → (α' → ε')) (p p' : ℝ≥0∞)
    (μ : Measure α) (ν : Measure α') : Prop :=
  (∃ c : ℝ≥0, HasRestrictedWeakType T p p' μ ν c) ∧
    (∃ p : ℝ≥0∞, p = p') ∧
    (∃ r : ℝ≥0∞, r = p) ∧
    (∃ G : Set α', IsCompact G ∧ μ G < ⊤ ∧ ν G < ⊤) ∧
    (∃ C : ℝ≥0, HasLorentzType T p r μ ν C) ∧
    (∃ C : ℝ≥0, ∀ (f : α → 𝕂), (memLorentz f p r μ) → eLpNorm (T f) 1 (ν.restrict univ) ≤ C * eLorentzNorm f p r μ) ∧
    (∃ C : ℝ≥0, ∀ (f : α → 𝕂), (memLorentz f p r μ) → eLpNorm (T f) 1 (ν.restrict univ) ≤ C * eLorentzNorm f p r μ) ∧
    (∃ C : ℝ≥0, ∀ (f : α → 𝕂), (memLorentz f p r μ) → eLpNorm (T f) 1 (ν.restrict univ) ≤ C * eLorentzNorm f p r μ) ∧
    (∃ C : ℝ≥0, ∀ (f : α → 𝕂), (memLorentz f p r μ) → eLpNorm (T f) 1 (ν.restrict univ) ≤ C * eLorentzNorm f p r μ) := by
